headline: south florida economy stays strong as tech & startup vibes keep building momentum

stories.title: ChatRank Founder Wins spARK Labs Innovation Showcase, Takes Bootstrap Route
stories.summary: Jon Mest fr lowkey chose to bootstrap his startup ChatRank after winning an Ark Invest innovation competition. dude's betting on self-funding over traditional VC right now.
stories.takeaway: bootstrapping is back in a weird way tbh, even when the funding's there to take

stories.title: Fort Lauderdale Downtown Economy Explodes 20% Since 2022, Becomes Regional Tech Hub
stories.summary: Fort Lauderdale's downtown is literally driving $43B in annual economic impact & growing 20% since 2022. Napster Corp planning a 60-acre HQ with 1,000 jobs is the cherry on top.
stories.takeaway: downtown ft lauderdale lowkey becoming the real tech epicenter, not just miami's little sibling

stories.title: Florida's Economic Outlook 2026: Growth Outpacing Nation, Housing Market Stabilizing
stories.summary: Florida's expected to keep beating national GDP growth in 2026 with unemployment around 4.2-4.3%. Housing prices stabilizing after rapid growth = market cooling into normalization.
stories.takeaway: florida economy's still flexing harder than the nation, just at a chill pace now

stories.title: South Florida Tourism Gears Up for 2026 With Major Events & New Infrastructure
stories.summary: Fort Lauderdale tourism expecting modest 1-3% growth in 2026, boosted by Formula 1, PGA tournaments & the new Omni hotel. Broward positioned to capture all those south & north bound travelers.
stories.takeaway: major events + new hotel infrastructure = south florida about to see that tourism money flow

watchNext.title: Miami & Angels Angel Investor Networks Merging to Create Statewide Powerhouse
watchNext.why: when major local angel networks combine fr, something big is cooking for startup funding in south florida

watchNext.title: Tech Hub Pulse 2026 Conference Explores AI, Space-Defense Tech & Economic 'Super Cycle'
watchNext.why: speakers fr saying next 60 months could see 3-5 major IPOs & a shift to deploying capital regionally, lowkey defining what's next
